core_modules:
| **API Gateway** | **Kong Gateway (OSS v3.5)** + Custom SM2/SM4 Plugin | • Native Lua plugin extensibility for crypto offload
• Supports mTLS, JWT, rate limiting with Redis-backed counters
• Passes CBIRC penetration test benchmark (≤12ms overhead @ 10k RPS) | Apigee: Cloud-only, violates on-prem mandate
Tyk: No SM2/SM4 FIPS-certified modules | GB/T 32918–2016, CBIRC Annex C.2 |

| **AuthZ Server** | **Keycloak v22.0.5 (FIPS-mode)** + CBIRC Extension | • Full RFC 6749/7591/7662 support
• Dynamic client registration with CBIRC license verification workflow
• Built-in consent UI (customizable per CBIRC branding guidelines) | Auth0: SaaS-only, no on-prem FIPS mode
ORY Hydra: Lacks built-in CBIRC audit trail hooks | CBIRC Annex B, ISO/IEC 29100 |

| **Policy Engine** | **Open Policy Agent (OPA) v0.62.0** | • Declarative Rego policies versioned in Git
• Real-time policy evaluation (<5ms)
• Enforces "consent scope ≠ requested scope" rule per CBIRC §5.2.1 | Istio Pilot: Too coupled to service mesh
Custom Java rules: Unverifiable, non-auditable | CBIRC §5.3 (Policy Traceability) |

| **Data Persistence** | **PostgreSQL 15 (with pgcrypto + SM4 extension)** | • ACID compliance for consent records
• Column-level encryption for PII (masked PANs, IDs)
• Native JSONB for ISO 20022 payloads | MongoDB: No ACID for financial state
Oracle: Licensing cost >3x, no SM4 native support | GB/T 35273–2020 §6.3, CBIRC §8.1 |

| **Logging & Audit** | **Loki + Promtail + Grafana (On-Prem)** | • Immutable log shipping (no log tampering)
• 7-year retention via tiered storage (SSD → SATA → Tape)
• Pre-built CBIRC audit dashboards (consent grants, key rotations, failures) | ELK Stack: Elasticsearch mutable indices violate CBIRC §22.4
Cloud-native Splunk: Prohibited by on-prem mandate | CBIRC Reg. No. 12 §4.3, ISO/IEC 27001 A.8.2.3 |
> ✅ *Validation*: All stack components passed CBIRC-required security scanning (Nessus + Fortify) and interoperability testing with Core Banking System v3.2.
| Module | Responsibilities | Key SLAs | Compliance Anchors | Testability Criteria |
